message:
Implement robustness improvements across codebase

CLI:
- Add file-based locking to prevent concurrent sync operations from
  corrupting the library cache (5-minute stale lock timeout)
- Add Zod schema validation for config.json to reject invalid values
  and prevent type coercion bugs
- Add server timeouts to OAuth callback server (keepAlive, headers,
  request timeouts) and validate port binding

Web:
- Throttle history pruning to once per minute per user to avoid O(n)
  scan on every view operation
- Add production warning for in-memory rate limiting on reports API
  to remind operators about Redis for multi-instance deployments
- Add safeDateMs() and safeParseDate() utilities for defensive date
  parsing that returns null instead of propagating NaN

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
